# Frontend Action Matrix — LoadPilot (DisbatchMe)

**Generated by:** STORY-002 — Main-Agent Interactive Frontend Exploration and Domain Triage
**Date:** 2026-03-12
**Method:** Static codebase analysis of App.tsx, component files, and server routes

---

## Overview

LoadPilot (DisbatchMe) is a 4-apps-in-one trucking management platform. The frontend is a
single-page React 19 application using a tab-based routing model managed via `activeTab` state
in App.tsx. There are no URL-based routes — all navigation is handled by `handleNavigate(tab, subTab?)`.

### Role-Based Rendering

| Role                                                       | Experience               | Entry Component            |
| ---------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------ | -------------------------- |
| `driver`                                                   | Driver Mobile Home       | `DriverMobileHome`         |
| `customer`                                                 | Customer Portal          | `CustomerPortalView`       |
| `admin`, `dispatcher`, `safety_manager`, `payroll_manager` | Full Operations Platform | Full sidebar + tab routing |
| (unauthenticated)                                          | Auth / Login Wall        | `Auth` component           |

---

## Route and Tab Inventory

All tabs are managed via `setActiveTab()` in App.tsx. Sidebar items are permission-gated
via `NavItem.permission` (legacy PermissionCode) and `NavItem.capability` (Agile Capability).

---

### OPERATIONS Category

#### Tab: `login` — Authentication / Login Page

- **Component:** `Auth`
- **Reachability:** Pre-auth only; user is redirected to `dashboard` after successful login
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Email input (text field) — login form
  - Password input (password field) with show/hide toggle button
  - Login submit button
  - Sign Up link button — navigates to multi-step signup wizard
  - Back button per wizard step
- **Signup Multi-step Form Sub-views:**
  - Flow order: login → signup → tier_selection → regulatory → equipment → money → ifta → templates → invites → payment
  - Account type select dropdown (owner_operator, fleet, carrier)
  - Subscription tier select dropdown (Records Vault, Fleet Core, Automation Pro)
  - Company name input, name input, email input, password input
  - MC Number input, Tax ID input, full address inputs (address, city, state, zip)
  - Freight type multi-select checkboxes (Dry Van, Refrigerated, Flatbed, etc.)
  - Payment card form: card number input, expiry input, CVC input
  - Seat count increment/decrement button (Plus/Minus icon)
  - Continue/Next button and Back/Previous button per step
- **Bugs:** No URL state — browser back during signup wizard breaks the flow with no recovery path

---

#### Tab: `operations-hub` — Unified Command Center

- **Component:** `IntelligenceHub`
- **Keyboard shortcut:** Ctrl+K toggles the hub from any tab
- **Header search input:** Clicking focuses the global search input and auto-navigates to operations-hub
- **Sub-tabs:**
  - `command` — CommandCenterView (default)
  - `feed` — Activity Feed
  - `messaging` — OperationalMessaging
  - `intelligence` — AI Intelligence
  - `reports` — Reports viewer
  - `crm` — CRM / Call Sessions
  - `safety` — Safety sub-view
  - `directory` — Contact Directory
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Sub-tab navigation button bar
  - Global search input (text)
  - New action plus button
  - Record workspace context panel (Load 360, Driver 360, Broker 360)
  - Filter dropdown per sub-tab
  - Phone/call session button
  - Message compose textarea + send button
  - Work item create button
  - Provider/contact save form (modal overlay)
  - Service ticket create form (modal overlay)
  - Close button (X) for context panel
  - Link session to record dropdown/select

---

#### Tab: `dashboard` — Management Console

- **Component:** `Dashboard`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - KPI metric cards (clickable link buttons) — active loads, gross revenue, open exceptions, SLA breaches
  - Exception type filter buttons
  - Load row click (navigates to load edit form)
  - View All Exceptions link button
  - Open Issues button (triggers IssueSidebar overlay)
  - Quick navigation shortcut buttons to other tabs
  - Search input (text) within exceptions widget
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/exceptions`, `GET /api/dashboard-cards`

---

#### Tab: `exceptions` — Exception Triage Console

- **Component:** `ExceptionConsole`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Search input (text) — filter exceptions by description
  - Filter tab buttons: all, delay-entry, carrier-delay, pod-missing, detention, customs, driver-issue, maintenance, safety, billing
  - View mode toggle button (list vs grid layout)
  - Exception row click (opens record workspace)
  - Status update dropdown/select per exception
  - More options dropdown button (MoreVertical icon)
  - View Detail link button per exception
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/exceptions`, `GET /api/exception-types`

---

#### Tab: `analytics` — Strategy and Analytics

- **Component:** `AnalyticsDashboard`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Date range select/dropdown
  - Metric selector tab buttons (revenue, loads, drivers, brokers)
  - Chart click-through navigation links
  - Export/download button
  - Navigate button linking back to dispatch/loads
- **API Dependencies:** Aggregated from `loads` and `brokers` props (no dedicated API call)

---

#### Tab: `loads` — Dispatch Board

- **Component:** `LoadBoardEnhanced` wrapping `LoadList`
- **Permission:** `LOAD_DISPATCH` + capability `LOAD_TRACK`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - New Intake button — navigates to `quotes` tab
  - Load card view/detail button (opens `LoadDetailView` modal)
  - Load edit button (opens `EditLoadForm` full-screen overlay)
  - Load delete button (with confirmation dialog)
  - Column visibility toggle buttons: Manifest, Status, Origin, Destination, Driver, Yield, Container/Chassis, Weight, IFTA Miles, IFTA Fuel, Profit Margin
  - IFTA mode toggle button (Manual / Auto)
  - View tailoring sidebar toggle button (Settings2 icon)
  - Grid view toggle button
  - Search/filter input (text) within LoadList
  - Status select/dropdown per load row
  - Driver assignment dropdown/select
  - Hub open button (opens IntelligenceHub messaging tab)
  - Download/export button
  - Print button
- **Modals and Overlays:**
  - `LoadDetailView` — full load detail modal
  - `EditLoadForm` — full-screen load creation and editing form
  - `LoadSetupModal` — wizard for broker/driver pre-selection
  - `Scanner` — document scanner overlay for BOL/Rate-Con AI parsing
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/loads`, `POST /api/loads`, `PUT /api/loads/:id`, `DELETE /api/loads/:id`

---

#### Tab: `quotes` — Intake and Quotes

- **Component:** `QuoteManager`
- **Permission:** `LOAD_CREATE` + capability `QUOTE_CREATE`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Pipeline / Details / Intake view toggle buttons
  - Search input (text) — filter quotes
  - Status filter dropdown/select (Draft, Sent, Negotiating, Accepted, Declined, Expired)
  - New Quote plus button
  - Quote card click (opens detail view)
  - Quote status change dropdown/select
  - Send quote button
  - Driver pay percentage toggle button
  - Lead card click (from leads pipeline list)
  - Booking management form inputs
  - Work item create button
  - AI assist sparkles button
  - Phone link button per quote
  - Email/mail link button per quote
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/quotes`, `POST /api/quotes`, `GET /api/leads`, `POST /api/leads`, `GET /api/bookings`, `POST /api/bookings`

---

#### Tab: `map` — Live Map

- **Component:** `GlobalMapViewEnhanced` (wraps `@react-google-maps/api`)
- **Permission:** `LOAD_DISPATCH` + capability `LOAD_TRACK`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Google Maps interactive map element (zoom in/out, pan, click)
  - Vehicle marker click (opens info window with driver and active load details)
  - Incident marker click (opens record workspace)
  - Load filter dropdown/select
  - Driver search input (text)
  - Filter button (by status or driver)
  - Map layers toggle button
  - Maximize/fullscreen toggle button
  - Weather overlay toggle button
  - Route directions button per selected vehicle
  - Map style select dropdown (satellite, terrain, road)
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/tracking/positions`, `GET /api/weather`
- **Bugs:** `VITE_GOOGLE_MAPS_API_KEY` falls back to placeholder string if env var missing — map renders completely blank with no error message. `VITE_WEATHER_API_KEY` similarly falls back.

---

#### Tab: `calendar` — Schedule View

- **Component:** `CalendarView`
- **Permission:** `LOAD_DISPATCH` + capability `LOAD_TRACK`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Previous month navigation button (ChevronLeft icon)
  - Next month navigation button (ChevronRight icon)
  - Driver filter dropdown/select (admin-only, shows company drivers)
  - Load card click within day cell (opens EditLoadForm)
  - Drag-and-drop load cards between day cells (reschedule load pickupDate)
  - Day cell drop target (accepts dragged loads)
  - Driver search input (text)
  - Today shortcut button
- **API Dependencies:** Reads from `loads` prop; calls `PUT /api/loads/:id` on drag/drop reschedule

---

### NETWORK Category

#### Tab: `network` — Partner Network Hub

- **Component:** `NetworkPortal`
- **Permission:** None (all authenticated users)
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Partner search input (text)
  - Network invite form (modal)
  - Partner profile card click
  - Filter tab buttons (brokers, carriers, drivers)
  - Add partner modal form with text inputs
  - Link/share button per partner
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/clients`, `GET /api/contracts`

---

### FINANCIALS Category

#### Tab: `finance` — Settlements

- **Component:** `AccountingPortal` (initialTab: SETTLEMENTS)
- **Permission:** `SETTLEMENT_VIEW`

#### Tab: `accounting` — Accounting Portal

- **Component:** `AccountingPortal` (initialTab from `activeSubTab`)
- **Permission:** `INVOICE_CREATE`

Both `finance` and `accounting` render the same `AccountingPortal` component with these sub-tabs:

- `DASHBOARD` — Financial KPI dashboard
- `AR` — Accounts Receivable
- `AP` — Accounts Payable
- `SETTLEMENTS` — Driver settlements
- `GL` — General Ledger
- `IFTA` — IFTA fuel tax (IFTAManager sub-component)
- `VAULT` — Document vault (FileVault sub-component)
- `MAINTENANCE` — Fleet maintenance costs
- `AUTOMATION` — Rules engine

**Interactive Controls (AccountingPortal):**

- Sub-tab navigation button bar (DASHBOARD, AR, AP, SETTLEMENTS, GL, IFTA, VAULT, MAINTENANCE, AUTOMATION)
- Create Invoice button (AR tab) — opens `AccountingBillForm` modal
- Create Bill button (AP tab) — opens `AccountingBillForm` modal
- Invoice row status select/dropdown
- Bill row status select/dropdown
- Settlement approval/pay button per driver row
- Journal entry form (GL): debit account select, credit account select, amount input, memo textarea
- GL account select/dropdown
- IFTA report generate button
- File upload input (VAULT): drag-and-drop zone or browse button
- Document download link button per file in vault
- Maintenance cost entry form (date input, amount input, description input)
- Automation rule create button
- Export to Excel button
- Export to PDF button
- Search input (text) — filter invoices, bills, settlements
- Date range filter dropdown/select
- Status filter dropdown/select
- Fuel matching rule execute button
- Data import wizard button (opens DataImportWizard modal)

**API Dependencies:** `GET /api/accounting/ar`, `POST /api/accounting/ar/invoices`, `GET /api/accounting/ap`, `POST /api/accounting/ap/bills`, `GET /api/accounting/settlements`, `GET /api/accounting/gl-accounts`

---

### COMPLIANCE Category

#### Tab: `safety` — Safety and Fleet Management

- **Component:** `SafetyView`
- **Permission:** `SAFETY_EVENT_VIEW`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Filter tab buttons (drivers, equipment, incidents, quizzes)
  - Driver compliance card click — opens driver performance detail panel
  - Safety quiz create plus button
  - Quiz question add plus button
  - Quiz question remove trash button
  - Asset register form (modal with text inputs)
  - Maintenance record save button
  - Incident create button (form modal)
  - Incident action record button
  - Incident charge record button
  - AI compliance analysis button (Sparkles icon)
  - Driver search input (text)
  - Driver performance metrics select/dropdown
  - Camera/upload button (Scanner integration for documents)
  - File upload input
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/compliance`, `GET /api/incidents`, `POST /api/incidents`, `PUT /api/incidents/:id`

---

#### Tab: `audit` — Audit Logs

- **Component:** `AuditLogs`
- **Permission:** `AUDIT_LOG_VIEW`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Search input (text) — filter audit events by entity, message, or user
  - Filter tab buttons (all, Status, Alert, System, Ops, Dispatch)
  - Log entry click (expands detail row)
- **API Dependencies:** In-memory reads from `loads.activityLog` and `dispatchEvents` props — no live API endpoint for audit logs

---

### ENTERPRISE Category

#### Tab: `company` — Organization Profile

- **Component:** `CompanyProfile`
- **Permission:** `ORG_SETTINGS_VIEW`
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Company name input (text) + save button
  - Address input fields (address, city, state, zip inputs)
  - MC Number input, Tax ID input
  - Operating mode select/dropdown
  - Freight type multi-select (checkbox group)
  - User list with edit button per row (opens `EditUserModal`)
  - User role select/dropdown (inside EditUserModal)
  - Capability preset select/dropdown
  - Accessorial rates input fields per rate type
  - Time log start/stop play/square button
  - User invite form (email input + send button)
  - Save company changes button
- **API Dependencies:** `GET /api/users`, `PUT /api/users/:id`

---

#### Tab: `api-tester` — Google Maps API Tester

- **Component:** `GoogleMapsAPITester`
- **Permission:** None (all authenticated users)
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - API endpoint select dropdown or text input
  - Request parameters input form
  - Execute test button
  - Response output display panel

---

## Global Overlays (Accessible from Any Tab)

### IssueSidebar — Issue Triage Overlay

- **Trigger:** Issues floating button in main content header area
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Issue list with status filter dropdown/select
  - Issue row click (navigates to load edit form)
  - Refresh button
  - Close button (X)

### LoadSetupModal — Load Creation Pre-Setup Wizard

- **Trigger:** New Intake button or broker Add Load button in BrokerManager
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Broker select/dropdown (pre-selected if launched from broker)
  - Driver select/dropdown
  - Load number input (text)
  - Phone call notes textarea
  - Freight type select/dropdown
  - Continue button and Cancel button

### Scanner — Document Scanner Overlay (BOL / Rate-Con)

- **Trigger:** Load creation when no load number is pre-supplied
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Camera capture input or file upload input
  - Scan/extract AI-parse button
  - Cancel button (X)

### CommsOverlay — Communications Overlay

- **Always present** for authenticated admin/dispatcher users
- **States:** floating, docked, collapsed
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Expand/collapse toggle button
  - Dock/undock toggle button
  - Active call session display panel
  - Link session to record dropdown/select
  - Navigate to operations-hub button

### EditLoadForm — Full Load Edit and Create Form (Modal Overlay)

- **Trigger:** Edit button on any load, or New Load action
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Load number input (text)
  - Status select/dropdown
  - Pickup date input (date)
  - Delivery date input (date)
  - Origin address input (text)
  - Destination address input (text)
  - Driver assign dropdown/select
  - Broker assign dropdown/select
  - Carrier rate input (number)
  - Driver pay input (number)
  - Freight type select/dropdown
  - Weight input (number)
  - Container/chassis input (text)
  - Leg add/remove button (multi-leg loads)
  - Fuel purchase entry form with inputs
  - IFTA mileage breakdown entry form
  - Activity log notes textarea
  - Expense entry form
  - Attachment upload file input
  - Save button and Cancel button
  - Open Hub button (links to IntelligenceHub messaging tab)

### LoadDetailView — Load Detail Read-Only Modal

- **Trigger:** View button on any load row
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Edit button (opens EditLoadForm)
  - Close button (X)
  - Open Hub sub-tab buttons (messaging, intelligence)
  - Activity log timeline display

---

## Role-Specific Experiences

### Driver Mobile Home (`DriverMobileHome`)

- **Role:** `driver` only (role-gated in App.tsx)
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Active load card click (expand detail)
  - Status update button (mark picked up, mark delivered)
  - Logout button
  - Open Hub button
  - Map navigation link button to load destination
  - Document upload input (BOL, POD file upload)

### Customer Portal (`CustomerPortalView`)

- **Role:** `customer` only (role-gated in App.tsx)
- **Interactive Controls:**
  - Load tracking cards (read-only status)
  - Document download link button
  - Open Hub button
  - Load filter dropdown/select

---

## Sidebar Navigation Controls (Admin/Dispatcher/Safety Manager)

Present in all admin, dispatcher, safety_manager, and payroll_manager experiences:

- Sidebar collapse/expand toggle button (ChevronLeft icon, desktop only)
- Mobile menu open button (Menu icon, mobile breakpoint only)
- Mobile menu close button (X, mobile only)
- Navigation item buttons (permission-gated per NavItem.permission + NavItem.capability):
  - Unified Command Center → `operations-hub`
  - Management Console → `dashboard`
  - Exception Triage → `exceptions`
  - Strategy and Analytics → `analytics`
  - Dispatch Board → `loads`
  - Intake and Quotes → `quotes`
  - Live Map → `map`
  - Schedule → `calendar`
  - Partner Network Hub → `network`
  - Settlements → `finance`
  - Accounting → `accounting`
  - Safety / Fleet → `safety`
  - Audit Logs → `audit`
  - Organization → `company`
  - API Tester → `api-tester`
- User avatar with initials display (bottom of sidebar)
- Emergency Sign Out logout button (LogOut icon)

---

## Global Header Controls

- Mobile menu toggle button (Menu icon)
- Global search input (text, 480px wide on desktop) — navigates to operations-hub on focus
- Unified Command Center header button (Zap icon) — primary operations-hub navigation
- Issues floating button (AlertTriangle icon with open issue badge count)

---

## Page and Tab Summary Count

| Tab ID         | Label                  | Component                    | Permission Gate   |
| -------------- | ---------------------- | ---------------------------- | ----------------- |
| login          | Auth / Login           | Auth                         | None (pre-auth)   |
| operations-hub | Unified Command Center | IntelligenceHub              | LOAD_DISPATCH     |
| dashboard      | Management Console     | Dashboard                    | None              |
| exceptions     | Exception Triage       | ExceptionConsole             | None              |
| analytics      | Strategy and Analytics | AnalyticsDashboard           | None              |
| loads          | Dispatch Board         | LoadBoardEnhanced + LoadList | LOAD_DISPATCH     |
| quotes         | Intake and Quotes      | QuoteManager                 | LOAD_CREATE       |
| map            | Live Map               | GlobalMapViewEnhanced        | LOAD_DISPATCH     |
| calendar       | Schedule               | CalendarView                 | LOAD_DISPATCH     |
| network        | Partner Network Hub    | NetworkPortal                | None              |
| finance        | Settlements            | AccountingPortal             | SETTLEMENT_VIEW   |
| accounting     | Accounting Portal      | AccountingPortal             | INVOICE_CREATE    |
| safety         | Safety and Fleet       | SafetyView                   | SAFETY_EVENT_VIEW |
| audit          | Audit Logs             | AuditLogs                    | AUDIT_LOG_VIEW    |
| company        | Organization Profile   | CompanyProfile               | ORG_SETTINGS_VIEW |
| api-tester     | Google Maps API Tester | GoogleMapsAPITester          | None              |
